title: Anchorage backs Treasury's GENIUS AML rules, seeks secondary-market sanctions clarity
message_html: Anchorage backs Treasury's GENIUS AML rules, seeks secondary-market sanctions clarity ...
snippet: A public comment letter argues that regulated stablecoin issuers need clearer compliance standards to avoid sanctions risks tied to secondary-market activity.

title: Tether leads up to $1.4 billion round in robotics firm Neura, plans crypto wallet integration
message_html: Tether leads up to $1.4 billion round in robotics firm Neura, plans crypto wallet integration ...
snippet: Tether will also provide and "deploy" technology within the Neura robotics ecosystem, including a crypto wallet integration.

title: Onchain gambling keeps rolling with $14B quarter despite crypto slump
message_html: Onchain gambling keeps rolling with $14B quarter despite crypto slump ...
snippet: TRM Labs said onchain gambling reached $51 billion in 2025, with repeat users and stablecoin flows helping the sector remain resilient during a broader crypto market pullback.
